---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for ScooterNav
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: shanemrussell888-coder
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe what problem you're trying to solve. (e.g. "It's frustrating when I can't find charging stations on the route...")

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you've thought of.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or links that help explain the feature.
